mapper.update: UPDATE dish SET name = #{name}, category_id = #{categoryId}, price = #{price}, code = #{code}, image = #{image}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, sort = #{sort}, update_time = #{updateTime}, update_user = #{updateUser} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO dish_flavor (id, dish_id, name, value, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user, is_deleted) VALUES
(#{flavor.id}, #{flavor.dishId}, #{flavor.name}, #{flavor.value}, #{flavor.createTime}, #{flavor.updateTime}, #{flavor.createUser}, #{flavor.updateUser}, #{flavor.isDeleted})
